content: Ogg Vorbis: unsupported in Safari until Safari 18.4 / iOS 18.4 (2025); older Safari needs MP3/AAC fallback. MP3 and AAC are universally supported. For a Windows-laptop Chrome/Edge/Firefox target, OGG alone is fine; ship MP3 fallback only if Safari support matters. caniuse.com/ogg-vorbis is the canonical table.
